architecture.description: Company laptops keep proprietary XML models local while shared PlantUML and IDEF0 rendering servers handle diagram generation behind the company firewall.

interface.description: Company laptops request rendered IDEF0 figures from a shared internal rendering service.
interface.software: The interface shall provide RESTful IDEF0 rendering within the company network.
The interface SHALL encode / escape the IDEF0 code in Base64 encoding [[RFC4648]].
The interface SHALL NOT encrypt the incoming or outgoing data. It is the responsibility of the company network and the firewall.

interface.description: Root / administrator access to the company server.
interface.software: The interface SHALL be password / SSH key protected.
